summarization.a: The figure displays difference FTIR spectra for N-Hy Stretch vibrations.
summarization.b: The figure displays difference FTIR spectra for N-Hy Bend vibrations.
summarization.c: The figure displays difference FTIR spectra for W-Fx Stretch vibrations.

a.question: After which part of the ALD process were the spectra recorded?
How do the N-Hy Stretch vibrations change when comparing the different samples?
a.answer: As exposure time and pressure increases, the N-Hy stretch vibrations decrease, indicating the desorption of N-Hy species.

c.question: How do the W-Fx Stretch vibrations change as exposure time and pressure increase?
c.answer: As exposure time and pressure increases, the W-Fx stretch vibrations increase in intensity, indicating the adsorption of W-Fx species.
